assessment_objectives.objective: organizational policy prohibits unauthorized software, systems and services in use by the organization (e.g., shadow IT).
no less than annually, financial expenditures are reviewed for instances of unauthorized software, systems and services in use by the organization (e.g., shadow IT).
instances of unauthorized software, systems and services in use by the organization (e.g., shadow IT) are investigated as cybersecurity incidents.
personnel responsible for unauthorized software, systems and services are held accountable per the organization's disciplinary processes.
